consent.title: Thanks for being here.
consent.body: A researcher would like to hear from you. It'll take about 15 minutes and your responses shape what gets built next. Choose how you'd like to talk:
consent.consentNotice: By continuing you consent to your responses being recorded and analyzed to improve the product.

thanks.title: Thank you.
thanks.withAnswers: Your {count} answers are on their way to the research team — they read every word.
thanks.noAnswers: You've helped shape what gets built. The team will read every word.
thanks.canClose: You can close this tab now.

connection.lost: Connection lost — your previous answers are saved.

errors.hiccup: Something hiccuped on our side — please send that again.
errors.micDenied: We couldn't access your microphone — you can keep typing instead.
